external relayers \u2014 DAG validators sign attestations as part of consensus.      Bridge model:        \u2022 Deposit  (Arbitrum \u2192 native): user locks UDAG in escrow via transferFrom.        \u2022 Withdraw (native \u2192 Arbitrum): validators attest, bridge mints UDAG to recipient.      Security measures:        \u2022 Reentrancy guard on all state-mutating external functions.        \u2022 Internal hash computation (never trust user-provided hashes).        \u2022 EIP-191 personal sign prefix for ecrecover.        \u2022 Strict signature ordering with no gaps \u2014 every signature must recover          to a valid validator; non-validator signers cause a revert, not a skip.        \u2022 Rate limiting (per-tx and daily caps) on deposits and withdrawals.        \u2022 Two-step governor transfer.        \u2022 Bridge auto-enables once MIN_VALIDATORS are registered.","errors":{"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"claimWithdrawal(bytes20,address,uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount to mint.","nativeSender":"Original sender on the native chain.","recipient":"Recipient on Arbitrum.","signatures":"Concatenated 65-byte ECDSA signatures (r\u2016s\u2016v), sorted by                        recovered signer address ascending. Every signature must                        recover to a registered validator.","withdrawalNonce":"Unique nonce for this withdrawal (assigned on native chain)."}},"deposit(bytes20,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of UDAG (8-decimal) to bridge.","nativeRecipient":"20-byte address on the native UDAG chain."}},"emergencyWithdrawERC20(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"For UDAG recovery, use migrateToNewBridge (requires pause)."},"getWithdrawalHash(bytes20,address,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Validators sign this hash using eth_sign (which prepends EIP-191 prefix)."}},"stateVariables":{"depositNonceCounter":{"details":"Monotonic counter used to assign deposit nonces."},"usedWithdrawalNonces":{"details":"Guards withdrawal replay: each native-chain nonce may only be claimed once."}},"title":"UltraDAG Validator Federation Bridge","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"acceptGovernor()":{"notice":"Complete governor transfer."},"addValidator(address)":{"notice":"Register a new validator. Auto-enables the bridge at MIN_VALIDATORS."},"claimWithdrawal(bytes20,address,uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Claim a withdrawal on Arbitrum backed by validator attestations."},"deposit(bytes20,uint256)":{"notice":"Lock UDAG in escrow for bridging to the native chain."},"emergencyWithdrawERC20(address,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Recover accidentally-sent ERC-20 tokens (NOT the managed UDAG token)."},"emergencyWithdrawETH(address)":{"notice":"Recover accidentally-sent ETH."},"getWithdrawalHash(bytes20,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Off-chain helper: returns the hash validators must sign."},"migrateToNewBridge(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Migrate escrowed UDAG to a new bridge. Only when paused."},"removeValidator(address)":{"notice":"Remove a validator. Cannot drop below MIN_VALIDATORS."},"setGovernor(address)":{"notice":"Begin two-step governor transfer."},"setThreshold(uint256)":{"notice":"Override threshold (must still satisfy BFT minimum)."}},"notice":"Bridge secured by UltraDAG validator set (strict >2/3 BFT params.nativeSender: Original sender on the native chain.
params.signatures: Concatenated 65-byte ECDSA signatures (r‖s‖v), sorted by                        recovered signer address ascending. Every signature must                        recover to a registered validator.
params.withdrawalNonce: Unique nonce for this withdrawal (assigned on native chain).

params.nativeRecipient: 20-byte address on the native UDAG chain.

emergencyWithdrawERC20(address,address,u.details: For UDAG recovery, use migrateToNewBridge (requires pause).

getWithdrawalHash(bytes20,address,uint25.details: Validators sign this hash using eth_sign (which prepends EIP-191 prefix).

addValidator(address).notice: Register a new validator. Auto-enables the bridge at MIN_VALIDATORS.

claimWithdrawal(bytes20,address,uint256,.notice: Claim a withdrawal on Arbitrum backed by validator attestations.

deposit(bytes20,uint256).notice: Lock UDAG in escrow for bridging to the native chain.

emergencyWithdrawERC20(address,address,u.notice: Recover accidentally-sent ERC-20 tokens (NOT the managed UDAG token).

getWithdrawalHash(bytes20,address,uint25.notice: Off-chain helper: returns the hash validators must sign.

migrateToNewBridge(address,uint256).notice: Migrate escrowed UDAG to a new bridge. Only when paused.

removeValidator(address).notice: Remove a validator. Cannot drop below MIN_VALIDATORS.

setThreshold(uint256).notice: Override threshold (must still satisfy BFT minimum).
